title: Craft+
description: Datapack, adding crafts that were lost, or would have been possible in vanilla Minecraft
body:
This datapack adds: Crafts that were lost, or would have been possible in vanilla Minecraft 📗\
Namely :\
Craft Totem              📒\
All chain mail armor    📒\
Apple notch             📒\
And others                   📒\
Great for single player play and on servers ✨\
Also good for add-ons and other modifications\
Also, the goal of the project is to add interesting and real crafts\
Desirable version 1.20.1
